name: sanxiu
description: Sanxiu（散修）— a responsive H5 English learning app with spaced repetition for words and sentences.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix server && npm run typecheck --prefix client
